name: U.S. GoldMining Inc.
business: We are a United States domiciled exploration stage company and our sole project is currently the Whistler Project, a gold-copper exploration project located in Alaska.

exposures.sentence: The Whistler Project is a gold-copper exploration project located in the Yentna Mining District, approximately 170 km northwest of Anchorage, in Alaska.

catalysts.event: Announced results of a positive preliminary economic assessment (PEA) on the Whistler Project
catalysts.sentence: On March 2, 2026, we announced results of a positive PEA on the Whistler Project.

catalysts.event: Announced plan to commence an initial economic assessment (PEA) for the Whistler Project
catalysts.sentence: On April 15, 2025, we announced our plan to commence an initial economic assessment for the Whistler Project.

catalysts.event: Announced commencement of metallurgical testwork at the Whistler Project
catalysts.sentence: On April 24, 2025, we announced the commencement of metallurgical testwork at the Whistler Project.

catalysts.event: Selected Ausenco Engineering Canada ULC as the principal consulting firm to lead the proposed PEA
catalysts.sentence: On June 9, 2025, we selected Ausenco Engineering Canada ULC as the principal consulting firm to lead our proposed PEA.
